name: Generate a cryptographic token
task: Create /tmp/eval_tok/tok.py with make_token(n_bytes=32) returning a URL-safe random token string from the secrets module (use secrets.token_urlsafe).

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_tok/tok.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); t = mod.make_token(32); assert isinstance(t, str); assert len(t) >= 32; assert mod.make_token() != mod.make_token(); print('OK')
